name: schovi-workflows
description: David Schovanec's personal Claude Code workflow plugins

plugins.name: schovi
plugins.description: Workflow automation for software engineering: publish (GitHub PR), review, feedback, debug, Jira/GitHub/Datadog auto-detection

plugins.name: homebrew
plugins.description: CI-gated GitHub release workflow for Homebrew-distributed projects - SemVer version selection, release notes, optional GoReleaser, tag publishing, release verification
